name: Nausicaä of the Valley of the Wind
description:
"I... I'm afraid of myself... I don't know what I will do in anger! I don't want to kill anyone else...!"

-Nausicaä

__________________________

So.. If you have ever been graced by the god that is Hayao Miyazaki then you are in for a treat.

CW: War, potential mentions of trauma involving the death of a loved one, and potential mention of death.

All characters are adults for the sake of posting.
